metadata.title: Merchant Advice Transaction Details (Tax Invoice)
narrativeText: PO Box:106, Road:120, Block:316, Manama, Bahrain TRN: 200000410700002
Shop:74 Road:2802 Block:428 MANAMA KINGDOM OF BAHRAIN
# Standard VAT Rate(10.000 %) applied on all commission: All Currency charged are in BHD.
This is a transaction advice. check your vouchers against the details above. Please call 1721 4433 in case of a statement to the contrary within 7 days from the date of the advice" Kindly any

notes: Forced OCR for merchant-advice layout to improve table/metadata recovery.
Merchant-advice layout detected: extracted page into transaction and summary table blocks.
Hybrid mode requested through opendataloader_pdf.convert(..., hybrid='docling-fast'). Forced OCR requested with high-resolution rendering target (320 DPI). Hybrid server must allow forced OCR.
OCR fallback used RapidOCR on page 1.
Rendered page images at high resolution and extracted OCR words with coordinates.
Merchant summary block reconstructed as a separate table.
Recovered multi-block merchant advice tables from OCR/text lines.
Table-dominant mode active: prioritized table fidelity and kept canonical metadata minimal unless strongly evidenced.
